Let me read the workflow file to see the exact steps.

content.content:
1	# NOTE: The name of this workflow is significant - it is used as the identifier for the workflow_run trigger in the release workflow
2	name: CI
3	
4	on:
5	  push:
6	    branches:
7	      - main
8	  # NOTE: Never use pull_request_target here because that would populate secrets for forks
9	  pull_request:
10	    branches:
11	      - '**'
12	  merge_group:
13	
14	concurrency:
15	  group: '${{ github.workflow }} - ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref }}'
16	  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/main' }}
17	
18	env:
19	  PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION: 24
20	  # Value will be controlled via GitHub environment (called "main") secret, will be read-write for main branch, read-only for other branches
21	  NX_CLOUD_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NX_CLOUD_ACCESS_TOKEN }}
22	  # This increases the verbosity of the logs for everything, including Nx Cloud, but will hopefully surface more info about recent lint failures
23	  NX_VERBOSE_LOGGING: false
24	
25	defaults:
26	  run:
27	    shell: bash
28	
29	#
30	# Workflow for how the CI spawns jobs:
31	# 1) Run the install and cache the install artefacts
32	# 2) Run the build and cache the output
33	#    - In parallel we also any steps that don't need the build (like prettier)
34	# 3) Run the steps that depend on the build
35	#
36	
37	permissions:
38	  contents: read # to fetch code (actions/checkout)
39	
40	jobs:
41	  install:
42	    name: Checkout and Install
43	    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
44	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
45	    env:
46	      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
47	    steps:
48	      - name: Checkout
49	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
50	      - name: Install
51	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
52	        with:
53	          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
54	
55	  build:
56	    name: Build All Packages
57	    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
58	    needs: [install]
59	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
60	    env:
61	      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
62	    steps:
63	      - name: Checkout
64	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
65	      - name: Install
66	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
67	        with:
68	          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
69	      - name: Build
70	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-build
71	
72	  generate_configs:
73	    name: Generate Configs
74	    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
75	    needs: [build]
76	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
77	    env:
78	      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
79	    steps:
80	      - name: Checkout
81	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
82	      - name: Install
83	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
84	        with:
85	          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
86	      - run: pnpm exec nx run generate-configs
87	      - run: git status --porcelain
88	      - if: failure()
89	        run: echo "Outdated result detected from pnpm run generate-configs. Please check in any file changes."
90	
91	  lint_without_build:
92	    name: Lint without build
93	    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
94	    needs: [install]
95	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
96	    strategy:
97	      matrix:
98	        lint-task: ['check-spelling', 'check-format', 'lint-markdown']
99	    env:
100	      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
101	    steps:
102	      - name: Checkout
103	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
104	      - name: Install
105	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
106	        with:
107	          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
108	
109	      - name: Run Check
110	        run: pnpm run ${{ matrix.lint-task }}
111	
112	  lint_with_build:
113	    name: Lint with build
114	    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
115	    # because we lint with our own tooling, we need to build
116	    needs: [build]
117	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
118	    strategy:
119	      matrix:
120	        lint-task: ['deduplicate', 'lint', 'typecheck', 'knip']
121	    env:
122	      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
123	    steps:
124	      - name: Checkout
125	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
126	      - name: Install
127	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
128	        with:
129	          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
130	      - name: Build
131	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-build
132	
133	      - name: Run Check
134	        run: pnpm ${{ matrix.lint-task }}
135	        env:
136	          ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG: true
137	
138	  stylelint:
139	    name: Stylelint
140	    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
141	    needs: [install]
142	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
143	    env:
144	      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
145	    steps:
146	      - name: Checkout
147	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
148	      - name: Install
149	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
150	        with:
151	          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
152	      - name: Run stylelint check
153	        run: pnpm run stylelint
154	        working-directory: packages/website
155	
156	  integration_tests:
157	    name: Run integration tests on primary Node.js version
158	    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
159	    needs: [build]
160	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
161	    env:
162	      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
163	    steps:
164	      - name: Checkout
165	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
166	      - name: Install
167	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
168	        with:
169	          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
170	      - name: Build
171	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-build
172	
173	      - name: Run integration tests
174	        run: pnpm run test-integration
175	        env:
176	          CI: true
177	
178	  plugin_unit_tests:
179	    # Note -- intentionally use the same name as unit_tests just so everything looks uniform in the checks section
180	    name: Run Unit Tests
181	    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
182	    needs: [build]
183	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
184	    strategy:
185	      matrix:
186	        exclude:
187	          - os: windows-latest
188	            node-version: 18
189	        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest]
190	        # just run on the oldest and latest supported versions and assume the intermediate versions are good
191	        node-version: [18, 24]
192	        package:
193	          [
194	            { name: 'eslint-plugin', params: '--shard=1/4' },
195	            { name: 'eslint-plugin', params: '--shard=2/4' },
196	            { name: 'eslint-plugin', params: '--shard=3/4' },
197	            { name: 'eslint-plugin', params: '--shard=4/4' },
198	          ]
199	    steps:
200	      - name: Checkout
201	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
202	        with:
203	          fetch-depth: 2
204	      - name: Install
205	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
206	        with:
207	          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
208	      - name: Build
209	        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-build
210	
211	      # collect coverage on just the primary node version and on linux
212	      # we don't collect coverage on the old node versions or other OSs so that they run faster
213	      - name: Run unit tests with coverage for ${{ matrix.package.name }}
214	        if: env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION == matrix.node-version && matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
215	        run: pnpm exec nx test ${{ matrix.package.name }} -- ${{ matrix.package.params }} --coverage
216	        env:
217	          CI: true
218	      - name: Run unit tests for ${{ matrix.package.name }}
219	        if: env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION != matrix.node-version || matrix.os != 'ubuntu-latest'
220	        run: pnpm exec nx test ${{ matrix.package.name }} -- ${{ matrix.package.params }}
221	        env:
222	          CI: true
223	
224	      - name: Store coverage for uploading
225	        if: env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION == matrix.node-version && matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
226	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
227	        with:
228	          name: ${{ matrix.package.name }}-coverage-${{ strategy.job-index }}
229	          path: packages/${{ matrix.package.name }}/coverage/lcov.info
230	          # Sadly 1 day is the minimum
231	          retention-days: 1
232	
233	  unit_tests:
234	    name: Run Unit Tests
235	    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
236	    needs: [build]
237	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
238	    strategy:
239	      matrix:
240	        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest]
241	        # note: do not run these packages on the oldest supported node versions -- we assume that the plugin tests have enough e2e coverage to prove everything works on the lowest node version
242	        node-version: [24]
243	        package:
244	          [
245	            { name: 'ast-spec', params: '' },
246	            { name: 'eslint-plugin-internal', params: '' },
247	            { name: 'parser', params: '' },
248	            { name: 'project-service', params: '' },
249	            { name: 'rule-schema-to-typescript-types', params: '' },
250	            { name: 'rule-tester', params: '' },
251	            { name: 'scope-manager', params: '' },
252	            { name: 'tsconfig-utils', params: '' },
253	            { name: 'type-utils', params: '' },
254	            { name: 'typescript-eslint', params: '' },
255	            { name: 'typescript-estree', params: '' },
256	            { name: 'utils', params: '' },
257	            { name: 'visitor-keys', params: '' },
258	          ]
259	    env:
260	      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: '${{ matrix.os }} - Node ${{ matrix.node-version }}'
261	      COLLECT_COVERAGE: false

271	      - name: Build

273	
274	      # collect coverage on just linux
275	      # we don't collect coverage on other OSs so that they run faster
276	      - name: Run unit tests with coverage for ${{ matrix.package.name }}
277	        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
278	        run: pnpm exec nx test ${{ matrix.package.name }} -- ${{ matrix.package.params }} --coverage
279	        env:
280	          CI: true
281	      - name: Run unit tests for ${{ matrix.package.name }}
282	        if: matrix.os != 'ubuntu-latest'
283	        run: pnpm exec nx test ${{ matrix.package.name }} -- ${{ matrix.package.params }}
284	        env:
285	          CI: true
286	
287	      - name: Store coverage for uploading
288	        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
289	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
290	        with:
291	          name: ${{ matrix.package.name }}-coverage-${{ strategy.job-index }}
292	          path: packages/${{ matrix.package.name }}/coverage/lcov.info
293	          # Sadly 1 day is the minimum

296	  unit_tests_project_service:
297	    name: Run Unit Tests with Project Service
298	    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
299	    needs: [build]
300	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
301	    strategy:
302	      matrix:
303	        package: ['eslint-plugin-internal', 'typescript-estree']
304	    env:

306	      COLLECT_COVERAGE: false,

file.content:
# NOTE: The name of this workflow is significant - it is used as the identifier for the workflow_run trigger in the release workflow
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  # NOTE: Never use pull_request_target here because that would populate secrets for forks
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - '**'
  merge_group:

concurrency:
  group: '${{ github.workflow }} - ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref }}'
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/main' }}

env:
  PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION: 24
  # Value will be controlled via GitHub environment (called "main") secret, will be read-write for main branch, read-only for other branches
  NX_CLOUD_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NX_CLOUD_ACCESS_TOKEN }}
  # This increases the verbosity of the logs for everything, including Nx Cloud, but will hopefully surface more info about recent lint failures
  NX_VERBOSE_LOGGING: false

defaults:
  run:
    shell: bash

#
# Workflow for how the CI spawns jobs:
# 1) Run the install and cache the install artefacts
# 2) Run the build and cache the output
#    - In parallel we also any steps that don't need the build (like prettier)
# 3) Run the steps that depend on the build
#

permissions:
  contents: read # to fetch code (actions/checkout)

jobs:
  install:
    name: Checkout and Install
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Install
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}

  build:
    name: Build All Packages
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    needs: [install]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Install
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
      - name: Build
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-build

  generate_configs:
    name: Generate Configs
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    needs: [build]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Install
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
      - run: pnpm exec nx run generate-configs
      - run: git status --porcelain
      - if: failure()
        run: echo "Outdated result detected from pnpm run generate-configs. Please check in any file changes."

  lint_without_build:
    name: Lint without build
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    needs: [install]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        lint-task: ['check-spelling', 'check-format', 'lint-markdown']
    env:
      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Install
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Run Check
        run: pnpm run ${{ matrix.lint-task }}

  lint_with_build:
    name: Lint with build
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    # because we lint with our own tooling, we need to build
    needs: [build]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        lint-task: ['deduplicate', 'lint', 'typecheck', 'knip']
    env:
      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Install
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
      - name: Build
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-build

      - name: Run Check
        run: pnpm ${{ matrix.lint-task }}
        env:
          ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG: true

  stylelint:
    name: Stylelint
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    needs: [install]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Install
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
      - name: Run stylelint check
        run: pnpm run stylelint
        working-directory: packages/website

  integration_tests:
    name: Run integration tests on primary Node.js version
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    needs: [build]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Install
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION }}
      - name: Build
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-build

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: pnpm run test-integration
        env:
          CI: true

  plugin_unit_tests:
    # Note -- intentionally use the same name as unit_tests just so everything looks uniform in the checks section
    name: Run Unit Tests
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    needs: [build]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      matrix:
        exclude:
          - os: windows-latest
            node-version: 18
        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest]
        # just run on the oldest and latest supported versions and assume the intermediate versions are good
        node-version: [18, 24]
        package:
          [
            { name: 'eslint-plugin', params: '--shard=1/4' },
            { name: 'eslint-plugin', params: '--shard=2/4' },
            { name: 'eslint-plugin', params: '--shard=3/4' },
            { name: 'eslint-plugin', params: '--shard=4/4' },
          ]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 2
      - name: Install
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      - name: Build
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-build

      # collect coverage on just the primary node version and on linux
      # we don't collect coverage on the old node versions or other OSs so that they run faster
      - name: Run unit tests with coverage for ${{ matrix.package.name }}
        if: env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION == matrix.node-version && matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
        run: pnpm exec nx test ${{ matrix.package.name }} -- ${{ matrix.package.params }} --coverage
        env:
          CI: true
      - name: Run unit tests for ${{ matrix.package.name }}
        if: env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION != matrix.node-version || matrix.os != 'ubuntu-latest'
        run: pnpm exec nx test ${{ matrix.package.name }} -- ${{ matrix.package.params }}
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Store coverage for uploading
        if: env.PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION == matrix.node-version && matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ matrix.package.name }}-coverage-${{ strategy.job-index }}
          path: packages/${{ matrix.package.name }}/coverage/lcov.info
          # Sadly 1 day is the minimum
          retention-days: 1

  unit_tests:
    name: Run Unit Tests
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    needs: [build]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest]
        # note: do not run these packages on the oldest supported node versions -- we assume that the plugin tests have enough e2e coverage to prove everything works on the lowest node version
        node-version: [24]
        package:
          [
            { name: 'ast-spec', params: '' },
            { name: 'eslint-plugin-internal', params: '' },
            { name: 'parser', params: '' },
            { name: 'project-service', params: '' },
            { name: 'rule-schema-to-typescript-types', params: '' },
            { name: 'rule-tester', params: '' },
            { name: 'scope-manager', params: '' },
            { name: 'tsconfig-utils', params: '' },
            { name: 'type-utils', params: '' },
            { name: 'typescript-eslint', params: '' },
            { name: 'typescript-estree', params: '' },
            { name: 'utils', params: '' },
            { name: 'visitor-keys', params: '' },
          ]
    env:
      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: '${{ matrix.os }} - Node ${{ matrix.node-version }}'
      COLLECT_COVERAGE: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 2
      - name: Install
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      - name: Build
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-build

      # collect coverage on just linux
      # we don't collect coverage on other OSs so that they run faster
      - name: Run unit tests with coverage for ${{ matrix.package.name }}
        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
        run: pnpm exec nx test ${{ matrix.package.name }} -- ${{ matrix.package.params }} --coverage
        env:
          CI: true
      - name: Run unit tests for ${{ matrix.package.name }}
        if: matrix.os != 'ubuntu-latest'
        run: pnpm exec nx test ${{ matrix.package.name }} -- ${{ matrix.package.params }}
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Store coverage for uploading
        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ matrix.package.name }}-coverage-${{ strategy.job-index }}
          path: packages/${{ matrix.package.name }}/coverage/lcov.info
          # Sadly 1 day is the minimum
          retention-days: 1

  unit_tests_project_service:
    name: Run Unit Tests with Project Service
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    needs: [build]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        package: ['eslint-plugin-internal', 'typescript-estree']
    env:
      NX_CI_EXECUTION_ENV: 'ubuntu-latest'
      COLLECT_COVERAGE: false,
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 2
      - name: Install
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-install
        with:
          node-version: 18
      - name: Build
        uses: ./.github/actions/prepare-build
      - name: Run unit tests for ${{ matrix.package }}
        run: pnpm exec nx test ${{ matrix.package }} --coverage=false
        env:
          CI: true
          TYPESCRIPT_ESLINT_PROJECT_SERVICE: true

  upload_coverage:
    name: Upload Codecov Coverage
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'main' || '' }} # Have to specify per job
    needs: [unit_tests, plugin_unit_tests]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download coverage reports
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: coverage

      - name: Publish code coverage report
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5.5.2
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          files: coverage/**/lcov.info
          flags: unittest
          name: codecov

file.content:
# IMPORTANT NOTE TO MAINTAINERS
#
# Changes to this composite action should be carefully considered and reviewed because it is referenced
# and executed by multiple workflows in our private-automations repository.
#
# Ensure that a member of @typescript-eslint/core-team tests changes there before merging.

name: 'Prepare: Install'
description: 'Prepares the repo by installing dependencies'
inputs:
  node-version:
    description: 'The node version to setup'
    required: true
  registry-url:
    description: 'Define registry-url'
    required: false
  # NOTE: This is required for our use-case of sharing this action across multiple repos
  working-directory:
    description: 'Override the working directory to run the installation in'
    required: false
    default: '.'

# outputs: - no outputs

runs:
  using: 'composite'
  steps:
    - name: echo github.ref
      shell: bash
      working-directory: ${{ inputs.working-directory }}
      run: echo ${{ github.ref }}

    - name: Install pnpm
      uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      with:
        cache: true

    - name: Use Node.js ${{ inputs.node-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: ${{ inputs.node-version }}
        registry-url: ${{ inputs.registry-url }}

    - name: Install dependencies
      shell: bash
      working-directory: ${{ inputs.working-directory }}
      run: |
        pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
        pnpm run check-clean-workspace-after-install
      env:
        # Other environment variables
        HUSKY: '0' # By default do not run HUSKY install
        SKIP_POSTINSTALL: 'true'

content.thinking:
Great! So the prepare-install action:
1. Installs pnpm
2. Sets up Node.js with the provided version
3. Installs dependencies with `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
4. Runs `pnpm run check-clean-workspace-after-install`
5. Sets HUSKY=0 and SKIP_POSTINSTALL=true

Now let me read the prepare-build action.

1	name: 'Prepare: Build'
2	description: 'Prepares the repo for a job by running the build'
3	# inputs:  - no inputs
4	# outputs: - no outputs
5	
6	runs:
7	  using: 'composite'
8	  steps:
9	    - uses: actions/cache@v4
10	      id: build-cache
11	      with:
12	        path: |
13	          packages/*/dist
14	          dist
15	        key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.ref }}-${{ github.run_id }}
16	        # We don't want to share builds across runs even for the same branch
17	        # because each commit can have different build artifacts and we don't
18	        # want to accidentally share artifacts and poison the build output
19	        restore-keys: |
20	          ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.ref }}-${{ github.run_id }}
21	
22	    # If the cache was hit, then we still run the types build because we generate source files
23	    - name: Build AST Spec
24	      if: steps['build-cache'].outputs.cache-hit == 'true'
25	      shell: bash
26	      run: |
27	        pnpm exec nx run types:build
28	
29	    - name: Build
30	      if: steps['build-cache'].outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
31	      shell: bash
32	      # Website will be built by the Netlify GitHub App
33	      run: |
34	        pnpm exec nx run-many --target=build --parallel --exclude=website --exclude=website-eslint
35	      env:
36	        SKIP_AST_SPEC_REBUILD: true

file.content:
name: 'Prepare: Build'
description: 'Prepares the repo for a job by running the build'
# inputs:  - no inputs
# outputs: - no outputs

runs:
  using: 'composite'
  steps:
    - uses: actions/cache@v4
      id: build-cache
      with:
        path: |
          packages/*/dist
          dist
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.ref }}-${{ github.run_id }}
        # We don't want to share builds across runs even for the same branch
        # because each commit can have different build artifacts and we don't
        # want to accidentally share artifacts and poison the build output
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.ref }}-${{ github.run_id }}

    # If the cache was hit, then we still run the types build because we generate source files
    - name: Build AST Spec
      if: steps['build-cache'].outputs.cache-hit == 'true'
      shell: bash
      run: |
        pnpm exec nx run types:build

    - name: Build
      if: steps['build-cache'].outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      shell: bash
      # Website will be built by the Netlify GitHub App
      run: |
        pnpm exec nx run-many --target=build --parallel --exclude=website --exclude=website-eslint
      env:
        SKIP_AST_SPEC_REBUILD: true

content.thinking:
Perfect! Now I have all the information I need:

The build action:
1. Uses caching for the build artifacts
2. Builds the AST spec if cache hit
3. Builds everything with `pnpm exec nx run-many --target=build --parallel --exclude=website --exclude=website-eslint`

Now I have enough information to create the Dockerfile and run.sh. Let me summarize what the job does:

**Job Details:**
- Name: "Run Unit Tests (ubuntu-latest, 18, eslint-plugin, --shard=4/4)"
- OS: ubuntu-latest
- Node version: 18
- Test: eslint-plugin with shard 4/4

**Steps:**
1. Checkout (with fetch-depth: 2)
2. Install (prepare-install action with node 18):
   - Install pnpm
   - Setup Node.js 18
   - Run `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
   - Run `pnpm run check-clean-workspace-after-install`
3. Build (prepare-build action):
   - Run `pnpm exec nx run-many --target=build --parallel --exclude=website --exclude=website-eslint`
4. Run tests (since node-version 18 != PRIMARY_NODE_VERSION 24):
   - Run `pnpm exec nx test eslint-plugin -- --shard=4/4`

content.thinking: Good. Now let me write the Dockerfile first. The job uses ubuntu-latest which is ubuntu:22.04, Node 18, and needs pnpm.

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_18.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm install -g pnpm

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && \
    pnpm run check-clean-workspace-after-install

RUN pnpm exec nx run-many --target=build --parallel --exclude=website --exclude=website-eslint

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

- Test Files: 45 passed (45)
- Tests: 7730 passed | 1 skipped (7731)
- Duration: 16.78s

The "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS" message is printed at the end, which indicates the tests ran successfully.

According to the instructions:
- If tests ran (even if some failed) → print FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS and stop.
- "Tests ran" means the test runner was invoked and produced results (pass, fail, or partial).

In this case, the tests ran successfully and all the test output is visible. The job is complete!
